name: Cottage Cheese Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg and add cottage cheese, mixing thoroughly.
2. Stir in milk and sifted dry ingredients.
3. Drop by teaspoonfuls into deep fat heated to 375 F in a skillet.
4. Fry until brown on both sides, about 4 to 5 minutes.
5. Drain on absorbent paper.
Makes 10 fritters.
